root_cause: S2C fell −6.5pp (31.6%→25.2%, 70% of ΔCVR) driven by two concurrent forces: (1) UTV Raptor Tour (TGID 37536, 44% of lost checkouts) — near-term inventory sold out throughout the post period (0–2d tickets zero, 3–7d collapsed to near-zero by late April), preventing date selection; ride-along TID 80075 remained available but users did not substitute, supporting committed-buyer interpretation; (2) Movie Sites and Jungle Expedition (TGIDs 37530/37532, 56% of lost checkouts) — healthy inventory confirmed, −9.1–9.2pp S2C drops attributed to spring break demand quality shift as high-intent visitors exited ~Apr 4. Re-scored 31/35 after report revisions: TGID 37536 split into TID-level traces, 8–13d chart removed, P2 close/escalate conditions added, LY badge added.
